# GitHub Configuration — ToyBox Blasters

Templates and automation entry points for this repository.

## Contents

| Path | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| [ISSUE_TEMPLATE/](./ISSUE_TEMPLATE/) | Bug reports and feature requests |
| [pull_request_template.md](./pull_request_template.md) | PR checklist (docs, tests, no secrets) |

## Documentation

Process docs live in [`PROJECT_DOCS/`](../PROJECT_DOCS/README.md):

## CI / Actions

Workflows will be added under `.github/workflows/` in later tasks (e.g. Task 013 folder structure). Until then, validate locally via Unity Editor menus under **ToyBox Blasters**.
